text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I set foot into the Twinkle Series with Copano
Rickey, the feng shui expert and racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's dream is to spread the word of
feng shui and fill everyone's hearts with
happiness. But first, she has to prove its power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning races using feng shui-based strategies
will do just that, so I decide to put her on the
path of her specialty—dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae and Wonder Acute are two dirt
runners preceding Copano Rickey's generation.
But we'll likely have to go up against them sooner
or later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite there being people who believe feng shui
to be merely superstition, through victory,
Copano Rickey will achieve her dream.
